name: Spicy Broccoli Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches broccoli rabe (1 lb each), trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces
1 pound penne or whole wheat pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add the broccoli rabe and blanch for 1 minute. Drain and pat dry.
2. In another large pot, bring the water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente.
3. Heat 2 teaspoons vegetable stock in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the raisins and cook, tossing frequently, until lightly toasted (about 1 minute).
4. Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly for 30 seconds. Add the broccoli rabe, water, red pepper flakes, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Cook until the broccoli is tender (about 5 minutes).
5. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the broccoli mixture. Toss to combine.
6. Divide the pasta among plates and serve.
